stemHtml: ICAO Annex 6 Part I Standards and Recommended Practices apply to…

options.a: The operation of aeroplanes by operators authorised for international commercial air transport.
options.b: All aeroplanes and helicopters in international commercial air transport.
options.c: All aeroplanes and helicopters in international general aviation.
options.d: All international general aviation aeroplane operations including large and turbojet aircraft.
